falsification_conditions.condition: The price rises above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear upward trend would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate a bullish breakout, invalidating the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would signal a breakout or panic buying/selling, directly opposing the 'HOLD' signal and pattern similarity to a prior bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' and pattern similarity to a prior bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
